name: SoulOS
description: Open-source runtime for persistent AI avatars with HEXACO psychometrics, episodic memory (pgvector), dual-process SSE chat, MCP for Cursor/Claude, Soul Studio UI, and TypeScript/Python SDKs.

mentions.name: SignalPR
mentions.description: AI-native PR execution platform using SoulOS hybrid sidecar for persistent agent memory and persona state.

mentions.name: Aeterna
mentions.description: Digital legacy platform using SoulOS for persistent narrator persona and episodic memory.

featureList: Episodic memory with pgvector semantic recall
Dual-process inference (System 1 message + System 2 msv_update SSE)
MCP server with ingest_memory, retrieve_memory, get_identity
Soul Studio browser UI for .soul.json authoring
Self-hosted Docker Compose and cloud gateway mode
